ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the crime occurred */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month in which the crime occurred */,
  "offense" TEXT /* Type of offense committed */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the crime was reported */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_time" TEXT /* Time of the crime */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case */,
  "investigating_unit" TEXT /* Unit or team responsible for investigating the crime */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_offense FOREIGN KEY ("offense") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of offense */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalty for the offense */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the legal statute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "police_district" TEXT /* Name of the police district */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime incident */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the victim */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the victim */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "victim_status" TEXT /* Status of the victim */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the victim */,
  "relationship_to_offender" TEXT /* Relationship of the victim to the offender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenders" (
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offender */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime incident */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the offender */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the offender */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the offender */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the offender */,
  "weapon" TEXT /* Weapon used in the crime */,
  "previous_convictions" INTEGER /* Number of previous convictions */,
  "background_check" TEXT /* Result of the background check */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the offender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenders_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenders_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenders_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenders_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenders_weapon FOREIGN KEY ("weapon") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of weapon */,
  "weapon_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the weapon */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start of the age range */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of offense */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend analysis */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  "geographical_scope" TEXT /* Geographical scope of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotspots" (
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime hotspot */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the hotspot */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate at the hotspot */,
  "hotspot_description" TEXT /* Description of the hotspot */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trend analysis */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the hotspot data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotspot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotspots_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotspots_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES crime_trends ("trend_id")
)
